indicators.name: Cabinets
indicators.rationale: The cabinets are too high to easily access during yoga.

indicators.name: Sink
indicators.rationale: The sink is too close to the cabinets, making it difficult to move around.

indicators.name: Chair
indicators.rationale: There is no chair available for sitting during yoga.

indicators.name: Towel
indicators.rationale: No towel is visible for wiping sweat after yoga.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for yoga due to the presence of cabinets, sink, and lack of seating and towel.
